summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 8 new pages for Blueview construction management app. All pages load correctly with proper UI rendering and navigation. Login flow works with provided credentials. Dashboard shows 5 Quick Actions + 2 Admin Actions for admin users.
passed_tests: Login with credentials rfs2671@gmail.com / Asdddfgh1$ - SUCCESS
Dashboard shows 5 Quick Actions (Projects, Workers, Daily Log, Reports, Integrations) - SUCCESS
Dashboard shows 2 Admin Actions (User Management, Subcontractors) for admin users - SUCCESS
Navigation from Projects list to Project Detail page (/project/[id]) - SUCCESS
Project Detail page loads with project info, stats, and 4 quick actions (Check-In, Daily Log, Report Settings, NFC Check-In) - SUCCESS
Project Detail shows 'No workers on site' empty state - SUCCESS
Check-In page (/checkin) - shows project selection and worker selection UI - SUCCESS
Check-In page shows Manual Check-In and NFC Tag Scan sections - SUCCESS
NFC Check-In page (/nfc) - shows scan interface with 'Start Scanning' button - SUCCESS
NFC Check-In page shows 'How it works' instructions - SUCCESS
Report Settings page (/project/[id]/report-settings) - shows Trade Mappings and NFC Check-In Tags sections - SUCCESS
Report Settings shows default trade mappings (Elec → Electrician, Plumb → Plumber) - SUCCESS
Worker Detail page (/workers/[id]) - shows worker profile with avatar, name, trade, company, OSHA number - SUCCESS
Worker Detail shows Certifications and Digital Signature sections - SUCCESS
Admin User Management page (/admin/users) - shows user list with 3 mock users - SUCCESS
Admin User Management shows Assign/Edit/Delete buttons and role badges (CP, WORKER) - SUCCESS
Admin Subcontractors page (/admin/subcontractors) - shows 3 mock companies with contact info - SUCCESS
Admin Subcontractors shows worker count and project count per company - SUCCESS
Owner Portal page (/owner) - shows password-protected login screen - SUCCESS
Owner Portal login with password 'blueview2024' - SUCCESS
Owner Portal dashboard shows stats (3 Companies, 2 Active) and admin accounts list - SUCCESS
Owner Portal shows Share/Edit/Delete buttons and Create Admin button - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 new pages follow Base44 glassmorphism design consistently
Admin User Management, Subcontractors, and Owner Portal use LOCAL MOCK DATA (not connected to backend APIs)
Check-in API endpoint exists but backend may not have full implementation for check-in persistence
NFC scanning is simulated on web - only works on native devices
All pages handle empty states gracefully with appropriate messaging
seed_data_creation: Created test project 'Downtown Tower' (ID: 697e64ffd54a8723c2b39c82) and test worker 'John Smith' (ID: 697e6599d54a8723c2b39c83) via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 new pages are implemented and working: Project Detail, Report Settings, Check-In, NFC Check-In, Worker Detail, Admin User Management, Admin Subcontractors, and Owner Portal. Admin pages (Users, Subcontractors, Owner Portal) use MOCK DATA - not connected to real backend APIs. Test project and worker created for testing. API base URL is https://blueview2-production.up.railway.app

mocked_apis_list: Admin User Management (/admin/users) - uses local mock data
Admin Subcontractors (/admin/subcontractors) - uses local mock data
Owner Portal (/owner) - uses local mock data for admin accounts
